tasks.label: git-check-status
tasks.command: git status --short --branch && git branch --show-current && git log --oneline --decorate -1

tasks.label: git-workflow-push
tasks.command: git status --short --branch && git branch --show-current && git add --all && git commit -m "Portfolio homepage v1 implementation" && git rev-parse HEAD && git push origin develop && git log --oneline origin/develop -1
